Core PCE — released ~3 weeks later, Fed's actual target metric

Core PCE — 5yr inflation expectations feed directly into Fed models

events.name: US Retail Sales
what_comes_next: PCE (Personal Spending) — released 2 weeks later, retail leads PCE
GDP Advance — consumer spending is largest GDP component
ISM Services PMI — retail strength feeds into services activity

events.name: US Housing Starts + Building Permits
what_comes_next: Existing Home Sales — released same week, demand side of housing
Mortgage Rate Watch (MBA) — housing reacts to rate changes with lag
Fed rate path reassessment — collapsing housing = rate cut pressure

events.name: BoJ Rate Decision
what_comes_next: USD/JPY carry trade reaction — immediate, yen strengthens on hike, carry unwinds
Japan CPI (Tokyo) — released within days, validates BoJ rationale
Asia equity open — Nikkei reaction sets Asia session tone for ETH
what_to_watch: Rate decision — any hike = CRITICAL risk event
USDJPY — yen strengthening = carry unwind risk

events.name: UK CPI
what_comes_next: BoE Rate Decision — primary input, services inflation drives BoE stance
UK Employment + Wages — released same week, wages drive services CPI
UK GDP Monthly — inflation + growth together = full picture
what_to_watch: Services CPI most watched by BoE

events.name: BoE Rate Decision + MPC Vote
what_comes_next: UK CPI (next month) — MPC dissenters signal what data matters
UK GDP Monthly — released within 2 weeks, validates rate rationale
GBP/USD reaction — BoE dovish = GBP falls = DXY up = ETH pressure

events.name: FOMC Rate Decision
what_comes_next: Powell Press Conference — same day, tone matters more than rate itself
Fed Dot Plot (if SEP meeting) — quarterly, rate path repricing = major ETH move
FOMC Minutes (3 weeks later) — details behind the vote, nuance move

events.name: Powell Press Conference
what_comes_next: Fed speeches (following days) — voting members clarify/walk back Powell tone
CME FedWatch repricing — immediate, futures re-price rate path live
10Y Treasury yield reaction — yields move → DXY moves → ETH follows
what_to_watch: Tone: hawkish/dovish shift vs last meeting
Q&A highlights — what reporters push on

events.name: PBoC LPR Decision
what_comes_next: CNY/USD fixing — rate cut = CNY weakness = BTC/ETH demand from China
China property data — LPR cuts aimed at real estate, watch developer stress
RBA response — Australia top China trade partner, AUD reacts
what_to_watch: RRR cut (separate event) — massive liquidity injection

events.name: Eurozone Flash PMI (Composite)
what_comes_next: UK Flash PMI — released same day, compare EU vs UK health
Germany Ifo Business Climate — follows within days, confirms PMI
ECB Rate Decision — PMI weakness = ECB cut expectations build

events.name: UK Flash PMI
what_comes_next: UK CPI — PMI cost pressures preview inflation print
BoE Rate Decision — weak PMI adds to easing case
UK GDP Monthly — PMI is leading, GDP confirms with 3-4 week lag

events.name: Germany Ifo Business Climate
what_comes_next: Germany Factory Orders — released 1-2 weeks later, confirms Ifo
ZEW Economic Sentiment — released same week, analyst vs business view
Eurozone GDP Flash — Ifo leads GDP by ~6 weeks
what_to_watch: 9,000 firm survey — best EU forward indicator

events.name: US Durable Goods Orders
what_comes_next: GDP Advance Estimate — capex feeds directly into GDP business investment
ISM Manufacturing PMI — orders lead production, confirms PMI direction
Factory Orders (full) — released 1 week later, broader manufacturing picture
what_to_watch: Core capital goods orders — capex proxy

events.name: Japan CPI (Tokyo + National)
what_comes_next: BoJ Rate Decision — hot CPI accelerates hike timeline
USD/JPY level shift — inflation = yen strength expectation
Japan Tankan Survey — quarterly, business confidence follows inflation
what_to_watch: Trend — rising = BOJ under pressure to hike

events.name: Core PCE Price Index
what_comes_next: FOMC Rate Decision — PCE is the Fed's number, hot PCE = holds/hike
Personal Income + Spending — released same day, demand behind inflation
Michigan Consumer Sentiment — inflation expectations sub-index confirms
what_to_watch: THIS IS THE FED'S ACTUAL TARGET — not CPI!
MoM vs YoY — monthly momentum matters

events.name: Germany CPI
what_comes_next: Eurozone CPI Flash — released 1-2 days later, Germany leads the number
ECB Rate Decision — hot German CPI = ECB hawkish pressure
EUR/USD direction — strong CPI = ECB tightening = EUR up = DXY down

events.name: Eurozone CPI Flash
what_comes_next: ECB Rate Decision — CPI is #1 input, hot = hold/hike, cool = cut
US CPI — released ~2 weeks later, global inflation comparison
Core PCE (US) — US PCE follows ~4 weeks later, confirms/diverges

events.name: NBS Manufacturing + Services PMI
what_comes_next: Caixin Services PMI — private services side, divergence from official
RBA Rate Decision — Australia reacts to China data (top trade partner)
Eurozone Flash PMI — Europe PMI drops same week, narrative chain

events.name: China Caixin Manufacturing PMI
what_comes_next: NBS Manufacturing PMI — official vs private divergence tells full picture
Eurozone PMI Flash — same-day or next-day, global factory comparison
US ISM Manufacturing PMI — completes global PMI picture ~2 days later

events.name: ADP Employment Report
what_comes_next: Jobless Claims — Thursday, one more data point before NFP Friday
NFP — ADP is the preview, but often diverges significantly
Average Hourly Earnings — released with NFP, wages matter as much as jobs

events.name: US ISM Manufacturing PMI
what_comes_next: US ISM Services PMI — released 2 days later, services = 80% of US GDP
ADP Employment — same week, labour market follows activity
Fed speeches — weak ISM prompts dovish commentary

events.name: Non-Farm Payrolls (NFP)
what_comes_next: Fed speeches (following week) — Fed officials respond to jobs data within days
Michigan Consumer Sentiment — released same day or next week, mood follows jobs
US CPI (2nd week) — jobs data feeds wage inflation → CPI narrative
what_to_watch: NFP surprise vs consensus → immediate ETH direction
Wage growth (Average Hourly Earnings) → inflation pipeline → Fed reaction

events.name: US ISM Services PMI
what_comes_next: ADP Employment Report — released same week, activity + jobs = full picture
Jobless Claims (weekly) — Thursday, continuous labour check
NFP — services employment is largest NFP component

events.name: JOLTS Job Openings
what_comes_next: ADP Employment — released same week, demand + actual hiring
NFP — JOLTS openings lead to actual hires in NFP
Average Hourly Earnings — high openings = wage pressure builds

events.name: RBA Rate Decision
what_comes_next: Australia CPI (quarterly) — drives next RBA meeting expectations
Australia Employment — released same week, dual mandate check
AUD/USD reaction — risk-on proxy, AUD up = ETH often follows
what_to_watch: China data dependency — RBA watches China closely

growth.name: 📈 GROWTH CHAIN
growth.note: GDP is quarterly — sets macro backdrop, not a trade trigger.

central_bank.name: 🏦 CENTRAL BANK CHAIN
central_bank.note: BoJ is the tail risk (carry unwind). FOMC is the primary driver.

regime_breakers.label: 🔴 REGIME BREAKERS (setup invalidation risk)
regime_breakers.description: CPI/FOMC events cause regime shifts — repricing trend changes. Powell pressers cause second-leg volatility after the decision.
regime_breakers.trading_impact: Do NOT hold directional positions through these. Wait for dust to settle.

directional_triggers.label: 💥 DIRECTIONAL TRIGGERS (trend acceleration or reversal)
directional_triggers.description: NFP sets directional volatility. Jobs + wages = full picture.
directional_triggers.trading_impact: Avg ±1.2% on release, sets tone for 1-2 weeks. Fade extreme reactions after 4h.

transmission_variables.label: 📊 TRANSMISSION VARIABLES (trend drivers)
transmission_variables.description: 10Y yield and DXY are not "events" — they are continuous structure. They determine whether setups like SMC, FVG, or BOS are valid or fragile.
transmission_variables.trading_impact: Monitor continuously. Rising DXY + rising yields = crypto headwind regardless of on-chain signals.

continuous_sentiment.label: 🔄 CONTINUOUS SENTIMENT / POSITIONING (filters)
continuous_sentiment.description: VIX, FedWatch, funding rates. Not news events — positioning pressure gauges.
continuous_sentiment.trading_impact: Use as filters, not triggers. VIX >20 = caution, >30 = panic.

micro_catalysts.label: ⚡ MICRO CATALYSTS (often overlooked)
micro_catalysts.description: Treasury auctions, jobless claims, PPI. Short-lived unless reinforcing a broader trend. More of a confirmation catalyst than primary driver.
micro_catalysts.trading_impact: Auction impact is usually short-lived unless it reinforces a broader yield trend. Claims trend over 4 weeks matters more than single print.

week1.label: WEEK 1 (1st–7th)
week1.trading_note: NFP sets the tone. Wait for CPI confirmation before large positions.

week2.label: WEEK 2 (8th–14th)
week2.theme: CPI/PPI — biggest movers of the month
week2.trading_note: ⚠️ BIGGEST MOVERS — CPI/PPI are primary ETH catalysts. Reduce size before, trade reaction after.

week3.label: WEEK 3 (15th–21st)
week3.trading_note: PBoC LPR — watch for China easing signal (1-2 week ETH lead). Retail Sales same week.

week4.label: WEEK 4 (22nd–31st)
week4.theme: End-of-month — PCE, PMI prep, cycle reset
week4.trading_note: Core PCE (Fed target!) + Tokyo CPI → BOJ risk. Germany CPI previews EU CPI.

current_week.label: WEEK 1 (1st–7th)
current_week.trading_note: NFP sets the tone. Wait for CPI confirmation before large positions.

key_rules: CPI surprise is the #1 monthly ETH mover — direction AND magnitude matter
FOMC + Powell = two-part event (decision + presser). Wait for presser before positioning.
10Y yield is the "real-time discount rate" for all risk assets
DXY rising during session = liquidity tightening signal
VIX above 20 = caution, above 30 = panic — reduce size
Treasury auctions: short-lived impact unless reinforcing broader yield trend
Claims trend over 4 weeks matters more than single print
PPI leads CPI by 2-3 months — watch for divergence
BOJ hike = highest-impact single event for crypto downside risk (Aug 2024: -20%)

cascade.action: First mover. BEAT = slight bearish bias (-0.14% avg). MISS = slight bullish (+0.34% avg). Direction sets tone for session inheritance.
cascade.key_signal: Initial direction — 81% inherited by Europe.

cascade.action: London inherits Asia direction 81% of the time. Front-runs upcoming Eurozone Flash PMI. Strong continuation signal.
cascade.key_signal: Europe continuation of Asia = high conviction. Reversal = rare (19%).

cascade.action: New York calibrates baseline for US ISM Manufacturing PMI (~2 days later). US session is where BEAT signals pay off best.
cascade.key_signal: US session amplifies or fades the move. Best session for directional trades.

cascade.action: NBS PMI drops. Caixin/NBS divergence does NOT reliably cause reversal (only 10-16% rate). Trend continuation dominates.
cascade.key_signal: NBS divergence = weak reversal signal. Accept the US closing tape.

cn_caixin_mfg_pmi.trading_implication: BEAT = BUY (+1.3%, 67% WR). MISS = BUY (+0.4%, 50% WR). STRONG_BEAT = flat (avoid). Phase0 < 0.15 = AVOID entirely. Phase0 0.15-0.30 + MISS = best setup.

cascade.action: Official state survey. Larger sample than Caixin. Divergence from Caixin = government vs private sector split.
cascade.key_signal: Above/below 50. Divergence from Caixin = confusion → vol spike

cascade.action: European desks use NBS + Caixin together. Agreement = strong signal. Disagreement = wait for EU PMI to break tie.
cascade.key_signal: EU PMI same week confirms or denies

cascade.action: US uses China PMI cluster to position for ISM. Strong China = commodity bid, risk-on.
cascade.key_signal: Commodity prices + USD/CNY reaction

cn_nbs_pmi.trading_implication: NBS vs Caixin divergence = reduced conviction. Agreement = high conviction directional.

cascade.action: Biggest single release. Immediate ±1.2% avg move. Employment + wages + unemployment = full picture.
cascade.key_signal: NFP surprise vs consensus → immediate ETH direction. Watch wages as much as jobs.

cascade.action: Asian desks digest NFP. If strong → Fed hawkish repricing → USD up → ETH pressure. If weak → rate cut expectations → ETH bid.
cascade.key_signal: CME FedWatch overnight repricing. Carry trade adjustments.

cascade.action: London confirms or fades Asia interpretation. ECB positioning adjusts to Fed expectations shift.
cascade.key_signal: DXY trend confirmation. Bond yield direction.

cascade.action: Full digestion. Fed speeches begin. Market reprices rate path. CPI (2nd week) becomes the next catalyst.
cascade.key_signal: Fed speakers tone. Rate path repricing complete.

us_nfp.trading_implication: NFP sets tone for 1-2 weeks. Extreme reactions fade after 4h. Wait for 2nd US session for trend confirmation.

cascade.action: Biggest ETH mover of the month. Immediate repricing of entire Fed rate path. ±1-3% move depending on regime.
cascade.key_signal: CPI vs consensus surprise — direction AND magnitude. Core CPI is sticky indicator.

cascade.action: Asian desks react to repricing. Carry trade adjusts. If CPI was hot → USD/JPY moves → carry unwind risk.
cascade.key_signal: USD/JPY reaction. CNY fixing adjustment.

cascade.action: ECB adjusts expectations based on global inflation picture. PPI (1-2 days later) is next confirmation.
cascade.key_signal: Bond yield direction. DXY trend.

cascade.action: PPI confirms or denies CPI. Fed speakers respond. Core PCE (~3 weeks later) is final target.
cascade.key_signal: PPI vs CPI alignment. FedWatch repricing.

us_cpi.trading_implication: CPI is a regime breaker. Do NOT hold through it. Position after dust settles (2nd US session).

cascade.action: Rate decision + statement. Immediate repricing. But the REAL move comes from Powell presser (30min later).
cascade.key_signal: Rate vs consensus. Statement language changes.

cascade.action: Powell press conference — biggest single ETH mover. Tone matters more than rate. Q&A = second-leg volatility.
cascade.key_signal: Hawkish/dovish pivot. Data dependency language. Q&A highlights.

cascade.action: Carry trade repricing. If hawkish → USD/JPY moves → carry unwind → ETH pressure. If dovish → risk-on.
cascade.key_signal: USD/JPY. CME FedWatch overnight shift. Asia equity open.

cascade.action: ECB positioning adjusts. DXY trend confirmed. Bond yields settle.
cascade.key_signal: DXY direction. 10Y yield. Cross-asset flows.

cascade.action: Fed voting members clarify/walk back Powell tone. Full repricing complete. FOMC Minutes (3 weeks later) = nuance.
cascade.key_signal: Fed speaker consensus. Rate path settled.

us_fomc.trading_implication: FOMC is a two-part event (decision + presser). Wait for presser. Then wait for Asia re-open for carry trade reaction.

cascade.action: CPI confirmation/denial. If PPI aligns with CPI → trend strengthened. If PPI diverges → confusion, chop.
cascade.key_signal: PPI vs CPI alignment. Pipeline inflation check.

cascade.action: Digest PPI + CPI together. Hot combo = hawkish Fed = pressure. Cool combo = easing expectations = bid.
cascade.key_signal: Combined CPI+PPI narrative for Fed.

us_ppi.trading_implication: PPI is a confirmation catalyst, not a primary driver. Its value is in confirming or denying CPI.

cascade.action: China monetary policy. Rate cut = CNY weakness = BTC/ETH demand from China. 70% correlation with ETH rally within 2 weeks.
cascade.key_signal: Cut magnitude. 10bp expected, 20bp = aggressive.

cascade.action: London assesses China easing impact on global demand. Commodity bid if cut is aggressive.
cascade.key_signal: CNY/USD fixing. Commodity prices.

cascade.action: US desks price in China stimulus. Risk-on if cut is meaningful. Property data follows to validate.
cascade.key_signal: China property developer stress signals.

cn_pboc_lpr.trading_implication: PBOC cut = slow-burn catalyst. Effect builds over 1-2 weeks, not immediate. Front-run by credit impulse data.

cascade.action: Rate + QT guidance. Lagarde presser = forward guidance. EUR/USD driver.
cascade.key_signal: Rate vs consensus. Lagarde hawkish/dovish pivot.

cascade.action: NY uses ECB to adjust DXY positioning. ECB hawkish = EUR up = DXY down = ETH bid.
cascade.key_signal: DXY reaction. EUR/USD direction.

cascade.action: Carry trade adjustment. Global rate differential repricing.
cascade.key_signal: USD/JPY. Cross-asset flows.

eu_ecb.trading_implication: ECB moves first → reprices DXY → FOMC adjusts. Watch for DXY trend reversal.

cascade.action: HIGHEST SINGLE-EVENT RISK. BoJ hike = carry unwind = ETH drops fast. Aug 2024: -20% in 3 days.
cascade.key_signal: Rate decision. YCC adjustment. Forward guidance.

cascade.action: London inherits carry unwind. If BoJ hiked → massive yen strengthening → global risk-off cascade.
cascade.key_signal: USD/JPY level. Nikkei direction. Cross-asset contagion.

cascade.action: NY amplifies or fades the move. If carry unwind is happening → US risk assets sell too.
cascade.key_signal: VIX spike. Treasury yield reaction. DXY.

cascade.action: Second wave positioning. If initial move was extreme → potential reversal. If measured → continuation.
cascade.key_signal: Nikkei recovery. USD/JPY stabilization.

jp_boj.trading_implication: BoJ hike = reduce ALL crypto exposure immediately. Carry unwind is the #1 tail risk for ETH.

cascade.action: First mover. BEAT = slight bearish bias (-0.14% avg). MISS = slight bullish (+0.34% avg). Direction sets tone for session inheritance.
cascade.key_signal: Initial direction — 81% inherited by Europe.

cascade.action: London inherits Asia direction 81% of the time. Front-runs upcoming Eurozone Flash PMI. Strong continuation signal.
cascade.key_signal: Europe continuation of Asia = high conviction. Reversal = rare (19%).

cascade.action: New York calibrates baseline for US ISM Manufacturing PMI (~2 days later). US session is where BEAT signals pay off best.
cascade.key_signal: US session amplifies or fades the move. Best session for directional trades.

cascade.action: NBS PMI drops. Caixin/NBS divergence does NOT reliably cause reversal (only 10-16% rate). Trend continuation dominates.
cascade.key_signal: NBS divergence = weak reversal signal. Accept the US closing tape.

cn_caixin_mfg_pmi.trading_implication: BEAT = BUY (+1.3%, 67% WR). MISS = BUY (+0.4%, 50% WR). STRONG_BEAT = flat (avoid). Phase0 < 0.15 = AVOID entirely. Phase0 0.15-0.30 + MISS = best setup.

cascade.action: Official state survey. Larger sample than Caixin. Divergence from Caixin = government vs private sector split.
cascade.key_signal: Above/below 50. Divergence from Caixin = confusion → vol spike

cascade.action: European desks use NBS + Caixin together. Agreement = strong signal. Disagreement = wait for EU PMI to break tie.
cascade.key_signal: EU PMI same week confirms or denies

cascade.action: US uses China PMI cluster to position for ISM. Strong China = commodity bid, risk-on.

cn_nbs_pmi.trading_implication: NBS vs Caixin divergence = reduced conviction. Agreement = high conviction directional.

cascade.action: Biggest single release. Immediate ±1.2% avg move. Employment + wages + unemployment = full picture.

cascade.action: London confirms or fades Asia interpretation. ECB positioning adjusts to Fed expectations shift.

eu_ecb.trading_implication: ECB moves first → reprices DXY → FOMC adjusts. Watch for DXY trend reversal.

events.name: China CPI + PPI
what_comes_next: China Trade Balance — released same week, demand story completes

what_to_watch: CPI negative = deflation → PBOC forced to ease
Both negative = Japan-style trap → massive stimulus expected

events.name: Jobless Claims (Initial + Continuing)
what_comes_next: NFP (if Friday follows) — claims Thursday, NFP Friday, back to back
Next week's claims — trend over 4 weeks matters more than single print
JOLTS Job Openings — monthly, structural demand behind weekly flows
what_to_watch: Sahm rule trigger (unemployment 3m avg rises 0.5%+ from low)

events.name: China Credit Data (TSF)
what_comes_next: PBoC LPR — credit impulse leads policy by 2-4 weeks
Next month PMI — did credit flow work?
what_to_watch: Credit impulse (change in credit/GDP) — leading indicator

events.name: US CPI (Headline + Core)
what_comes_next: US PPI — released 1-2 days later, upstream cost confirmation
Core PCE — released ~3 weeks later, Fed's actual target metric
FOMC Rate Decision — CPI reprices the entire Fed rate path immediately
what_to_watch: CPI vs consensus surprise — direction AND magnitude
Core CPI (ex food/energy) — sticky inflation indicator
Market pricing: did DXY already price in the print?
CURRENT REGIME determines expected move magnitude — see eth_by_regime

events.name: UK GDP Monthly
what_comes_next: BoE Rate Decision — consecutive negative months = recession = cut cycle
UK Retail Sales — GDP components confirmed, spending leads services
GBP/USD direction — weak GDP = dovish BoE = GBP falls
what_to_watch: Unique: UK releases GDP monthly (not quarterly)

events.name: US PPI (Producer Price Index)
what_comes_next: Core PCE — PPI components feed directly into PCE calculation
Retail Sales — released same week, demand side vs cost side
Fed speeches — hot PPI + CPI = hawkish Fed commentary follows
what_to_watch: Confirms or denies CPI — pipeline inflation check

events.name: Michigan Consumer Sentiment
what_comes_next: Conference Board Consumer Confidence — released following week, second sentiment read
Retail Sales — sentiment leads spending by ~2-4 weeks
Core PCE — 5yr inflation expectations feed directly into Fed models
what_to_watch: Inflation expectations sub-index — Fed watches this

events.name: US Retail Sales
what_comes_next: PCE (Personal Spending) — released 2 weeks later, retail leads PCE
GDP Advance — consumer spending is largest GDP component
ISM Services PMI — retail strength feeds into services activity

events.name: US Housing Starts + Building Permits
what_comes_next: Existing Home Sales — released same week, demand side of housing
Mortgage Rate Watch (MBA) — housing reacts to rate changes with lag
Fed rate path reassessment — collapsing housing = rate cut pressure

events.name: BoJ Rate Decision
what_comes_next: USD/JPY carry trade reaction — immediate, yen strengthens on hike, carry unwinds
Japan CPI (Tokyo) — released within days, validates BoJ rationale
Asia equity open — Nikkei reaction sets Asia session tone for ETH
what_to_watch: Rate decision — any hike = CRITICAL risk event
USDJPY — yen strengthening = carry unwind risk

events.name: UK CPI
what_comes_next: BoE Rate Decision — primary input, services inflation drives BoE stance
UK Employment + Wages — released same week, wages drive services CPI
UK GDP Monthly — inflation + growth together = full picture
what_to_watch: Services CPI most watched by BoE

events.name: BoE Rate Decision + MPC Vote
what_comes_next: UK CPI (next month) — MPC dissenters signal what data matters
UK GDP Monthly — released within 2 weeks, validates rate rationale
GBP/USD reaction — BoE dovish = GBP falls = DXY up = ETH pressure

events.name: FOMC Rate Decision
what_comes_next: Powell Press Conference — same day, tone matters more than rate itself
Fed Dot Plot (if SEP meeting) — quarterly, rate path repricing = major ETH move
FOMC Minutes (3 weeks later) — details behind the vote, nuance move

events.name: Powell Press Conference
what_comes_next: Fed speeches (following days) — voting members clarify/walk back Powell tone
CME FedWatch repricing — immediate, futures re-price rate path live
10Y Treasury yield reaction — yields move → DXY moves → ETH follows
what_to_watch: Tone: hawkish/dovish shift vs last meeting
Q&A highlights — what reporters push on

events.name: PBoC LPR Decision
what_comes_next: CNY/USD fixing — rate cut = CNY weakness = BTC/ETH demand from China
China property data — LPR cuts aimed at real estate, watch developer stress
RBA response — Australia top China trade partner, AUD reacts
what_to_watch: RRR cut (separate event) — massive liquidity injection

events.name: Eurozone Flash PMI (Composite)
what_comes_next: UK Flash PMI — released same day, compare EU vs UK health
Germany Ifo Business Climate — follows within days, confirms PMI
ECB Rate Decision — PMI weakness = ECB cut expectations build

events.name: UK Flash PMI
what_comes_next: UK CPI — PMI cost pressures preview inflation print
BoE Rate Decision — weak PMI adds to easing case
UK GDP Monthly — PMI is leading, GDP confirms with 3-4 week lag

events.name: Germany Ifo Business Climate
what_comes_next: Germany Factory Orders — released 1-2 weeks later, confirms Ifo
ZEW Economic Sentiment — released same week, analyst vs business view
Eurozone GDP Flash — Ifo leads GDP by ~6 weeks
what_to_watch: 9,000 firm survey — best EU forward indicator

events.name: US Durable Goods Orders
what_comes_next: GDP Advance Estimate — capex feeds directly into GDP business investment
ISM Manufacturing PMI — orders lead production, confirms PMI direction
Factory Orders (full) — released 1 week later, broader manufacturing picture
what_to_watch: Core capital goods orders — capex proxy

events.name: Japan CPI (Tokyo + National)
what_comes_next: BoJ Rate Decision — hot CPI accelerates hike timeline
USD/JPY level shift — inflation = yen strength expectation
Japan Tankan Survey — quarterly, business confidence follows inflation
what_to_watch: Trend — rising = BOJ under pressure to hike

events.name: Core PCE Price Index
what_comes_next: FOMC Rate Decision — PCE is the Fed's number, hot PCE = holds/hike
Personal Income + Spending — released same day, demand behind inflation
Michigan Consumer Sentiment — inflation expectations sub-index confirms
what_to_watch: THIS IS THE FED'S ACTUAL TARGET — not CPI!
MoM vs YoY — monthly momentum matters

events.name: Germany CPI
what_comes_next: Eurozone CPI Flash — released 1-2 days later, Germany leads the number
ECB Rate Decision — hot German CPI = ECB hawkish pressure
EUR/USD direction — strong CPI = ECB tightening = EUR up = DXY down

events.name: Eurozone CPI Flash
what_comes_next: ECB Rate Decision — CPI is #1 input, hot = hold/hike, cool = cut
US CPI — released ~2 weeks later, global inflation comparison
Core PCE (US) — US PCE follows ~4 weeks later, confirms/diverges

events.name: NBS Manufacturing + Services PMI
what_comes_next: Caixin Services PMI — private services side, divergence from official
RBA Rate Decision — Australia reacts to China data (top trade partner)
Eurozone Flash PMI — Europe PMI drops same week, narrative chain

events.name: China Caixin Manufacturing PMI
what_comes_next: NBS Manufacturing PMI — official vs private divergence tells full picture
Eurozone PMI Flash — same-day or next-day, global factory comparison
US ISM Manufacturing PMI — completes global PMI picture ~2 days later

events.name: ADP Employment Report
what_comes_next: Jobless Claims — Thursday, one more data point before NFP Friday
NFP — ADP is the preview, but often diverges significantly
Average Hourly Earnings — released with NFP, wages matter as much as jobs

events.name: US ISM Manufacturing PMI
what_comes_next: US ISM Services PMI — released 2 days later, services = 80% of US GDP
ADP Employment — same week, labour market follows activity
Fed speeches — weak ISM prompts dovish commentary

events.name: Non-Farm Payrolls (NFP)
what_comes_next: Fed speeches (following week) — Fed officials respond to jobs data within days
Michigan Consumer Sentiment — released same day or next week, mood follows jobs
US CPI (2nd week) — jobs data feeds wage inflation → CPI narrative
what_to_watch: NFP surprise vs consensus → immediate ETH direction
Wage growth (Average Hourly Earnings) → inflation pipeline → Fed reaction

events.name: US ISM Services PMI
what_comes_next: ADP Employment Report — released same week, activity + jobs = full picture
Jobless Claims (weekly) — Thursday, continuous labour check
NFP — services employment is largest NFP component

events.name: JOLTS Job Openings
what_comes_next: ADP Employment — released same week, demand + actual hiring
NFP — JOLTS openings lead to actual hires in NFP
Average Hourly Earnings — high openings = wage pressure builds

events.name: RBA Rate Decision
what_comes_next: Australia CPI (quarterly) — drives next RBA meeting expectations
Australia Employment — released same week, dual mandate check
AUD/USD reaction — risk-on proxy, AUD up = ETH often follows
what_to_watch: China data dependency — RBA watches China closely

events.name: China Trade Balance
what_comes_next: China CPI/PPI — released same week, demand + inflation together
PBoC LPR — weak trade = easing expectations

realtime_signals.note: Strong dollar = crypto headwind

realtime_signals.note: Yield spike = risk-off = ETH sells

realtime_signals.note: Oil spike = inflation fear = ETH pressure

regime_breakers.label: 🔴 REGIME BREAKERS (setup invalidation risk)
regime_breakers.description: CPI/FOMC events cause regime shifts — repricing trend changes. Powell pressers cause second-leg volatility after the decision.
regime_breakers.trading_impact: Do NOT hold directional positions through these. Wait for dust to settle.

directional_triggers.label: 💥 DIRECTIONAL TRIGGERS (trend acceleration or reversal)
directional_triggers.description: NFP sets directional volatility. Jobs + wages = full picture.
directional_triggers.trading_impact: Avg ±1.2% on release, sets tone for 1-2 weeks. Fade extreme reactions after 4h.

transmission_variables.label: 📊 TRANSMISSION VARIABLES (trend drivers)
transmission_variables.description: 10Y yield and DXY are not "events" — they are continuous structure. They determine whether setups like SMC, FVG, or BOS are valid or fragile.
transmission_variables.trading_impact: Monitor continuously. Rising DXY + rising yields = crypto headwind regardless of on-chain signals.

continuous_sentiment.label: 🔄 CONTINUOUS SENTIMENT / POSITIONING (filters)
continuous_sentiment.description: VIX, FedWatch, funding rates. Not news events — positioning pressure gauges.
continuous_sentiment.trading_impact: Use as filters, not triggers. VIX >20 = caution, >30 = panic.

micro_catalysts.label: ⚡ MICRO CATALYSTS (often overlooked)
micro_catalysts.description: Treasury auctions, jobless claims, PPI. Short-lived unless reinforcing a broader trend. More of a confirmation catalyst than primary driver.
micro_catalysts.trading_impact: Auction impact is usually short-lived unless it reinforces a broader yield trend. Claims trend over 4 weeks matters more than single print.

regime_breakers.label: 🔴 REGIME BREAKERS (setup invalidation risk)
regime_breakers.description: CPI/FOMC events cause regime shifts — repricing trend changes. Powell pressers cause second-leg volatility after the decision.
regime_breakers.trading_impact: Do NOT hold directional positions through these. Wait for dust to settle.

directional_triggers.label: 💥 DIRECTIONAL TRIGGERS (trend acceleration or reversal)
directional_triggers.description: NFP sets directional volatility. Jobs + wages = full picture.
directional_triggers.trading_impact: Avg ±1.2% on release, sets tone for 1-2 weeks. Fade extreme reactions after 4h.

transmission_variables.label: 📊 TRANSMISSION VARIABLES (trend drivers)
transmission_variables.description: 10Y yield and DXY are not "events" — they are continuous structure. They determine whether setups like SMC, FVG, or BOS are valid or fragile.
transmission_variables.trading_impact: Monitor continuously. Rising DXY + rising yields = crypto headwind regardless of on-chain signals.

continuous_sentiment.label: 🔄 CONTINUOUS SENTIMENT / POSITIONING (filters)
continuous_sentiment.description: VIX, FedWatch, funding rates. Not news events — positioning pressure gauges.
continuous_sentiment.trading_impact: Use as filters, not triggers. VIX >20 = caution, >30 = panic.

micro_catalysts.label: ⚡ MICRO CATALYSTS (often overlooked)
micro_catalysts.description: Treasury auctions, jobless claims, PPI. Short-lived unless reinforcing a broader trend. More of a confirmation catalyst than primary driver.
micro_catalysts.trading_impact: Auction impact is usually short-lived unless it reinforces a broader yield trend. Claims trend over 4 weeks matters more than single print.
